old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-ahmj","title":"[codereview-pass-1] draft-lichen-schc-lora-00.md:4 Rule 3/4 RPL tables do not distinguish DIO vs DAO Code or compress RPL options P1","description":"Rules 3 and 4 have nearly identical IPv6/ICMP tables with value-sent for Code. Per RFC 6550, DIO uses code 1, DAO uses code 2; rules should use MO=equal on Code field. Additionally, RPL messages contain variable options (Pad, DAG Metric, Prefix Info, Target, Transit, etc.) that require additional rule entries for full compression. See appendix-rpl.md and 03-adaptation.md for details. Align tables with full structure.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2026-07-22T14:58:07.768556555Z","created_by":"ec2-user","updated_at":"2026-07-22T14:58:07.768556555Z"}
